_comment: Split-horizon DNS demo: the internal provider answers clients with the LAN edge address while the public provider answers the internet with the public edge address (mock providers — safe, no infra). The `ha` origin shows the STRUCTURED internal-scope form: declared internal-only, so no public DNS record is demanded or created for it, and audit raises a critical internal_scope_public_exposure finding if it ever becomes publicly reachable anyway. `expose <svc> --scope internal` persists this form automatically.
